message:
fix(engine): hash stability, no-op exception correctness, and builder validation

release_gate.rs:
- apply_exception() on already-passing results is now a true no-op:
  early return without mutating exception_applied or recomputing digest,
  preventing two distinct digests for semantically identical state
- GateCheckKind uses stable numeric discriminants (0-3) in hash instead
  of Display string, decoupling content hash from formatting changes
- Two new regression tests: gate_check_kind_hash_stable_discriminant
  and apply_exception_noop_on_passing_result_preserves_digest

translation_validation_receipt.rs:
- Two new regression tests verifying hash_rewrite_category() uses
  stable numeric discriminants (all 10 RewriteCategory variants
  produce unique hashes) and ProofEvidence metadata is length-prefixed

proof_specialization_receipt.rs:
- ReceiptBuilder::build() now validates fallback_path is non-empty,
  returning ReceiptError::EmptyFallbackPath — previously the builder
  could construct a receipt that would fail validate() later
- New test: builder_rejects_empty_fallback_path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
